hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "GRAPHIFY REMINDER: graphify-out/graph.json exists. Fall back to Grep/Glob only for literal string/syntax searches."}}'
